query: we keep trying to improve the customer experience at this bank and nothing ever lands — pilots succeed but nothing gets scaled, recommendations get made and nothing changes. I need to do a systematic scan of what's actually blocking us. I've got stakeholder interview notes from 12 people.

my client says 'we've tried CX transformation before and it didn't work' — i need to map all the organisational, cultural, process and technology blockers before we design the new program so we don't repeat the same mistakes

I'm doing discovery for a complaints experience redesign at an insurance company. Before I start designing solutions I want to understand all the internal and external forces that are preventing a better complaints experience — political, structural, tech, the lot.

i've got notes from a bunch of stakeholder interviews where people described why CX improvement is hard here. can you help me turn these into a structured blocker map with severity ratings so i can show the leadership team what's actually in the way?

we're writing a CX strategy for a telco and need a section on 'what's blocking us' — I want to go beyond the obvious stuff (legacy tech, siloed data) and surface the cultural and leadership blockers that people don't usually put on paper

starting a new CX program at a hospital and the exec team thinks it'll be easy — i need a reality check on what blockers exist across the org before we set expectations. they've given me their org chart, some process docs, and a staff satisfaction survey

our client's NPS has been declining for 3 years despite multiple initiatives. something structural is blocking improvement and I want to do a proper blocker analysis across all 8 categories before our next steering committee

I need to identify the 3 highest-leverage blockers in this organisation — the ones that if addressed would unlock the most CX improvement. I have the biz-context output and some interview notes. Can you map the full blocker landscape and then tell me where to start?

we need to present to the board on 'why CX transformation is hard here' and we want it to be specific and evidence-based — not just 'change is hard'. Help me build a blocker map from our discovery materials
I want to understand what's causing poor customer satisfaction scores at this company — is it a product problem or a service problem?
can you help me run a stakeholder workshop to get alignment on CX priorities? I need an agenda and facilitation guide
what risks should i include in the risk register for our CX business case?
I need help getting leadership buy-in for our CX program — how should I frame the investment case?
can you help me map the customer journey for the onboarding experience at a bank?
I want to do a root cause analysis of why our contact centre volumes are so high — what's driving the unnecessary contacts?
help me understand what's happening with the regulatory environment in financial services and how it affects what we can do with customer data
i need to build a change management plan for rolling out a new CRM system to our service team
we have a culture problem in our CX team — people are disengaged and turnover is high. how do we fix it?
my client has fragmented customer data across 5 systems and no single customer view — what technology should they invest in?
can you help me prioritise a list of 15 CX initiatives based on impact and feasibility?
